name: cannibal_live_world_exposed_sight_avoid_v0_2026-04-28
description: Cannibal live-world exposed-scout footing for audited product-proof scenario 3: inherit the existing local sight-avoid player placement, then seed a camp-shaped cannibal_camp over the same nearby hostile-site footprint. This keeps the proof bounded to the shared hostile-site substrate while requiring the same-run artifact to show cannibal_camp exposure/hold-off/sight-avoid behavior instead of a visible beeline or teleport.
